settings.title: Spring Rose Tasting, One Evening Only
settings.excerpt: Six roses from Provence to Tavel, poured blind, with snacks to match, on the last Thursday of April.
settings.body:
Rose season is nearly here, so we are clearing the back tables for a guided tasting on the last Thursday of April.

You will try six bottles blind, from a pale Provence to a structured Tavel that drinks more like a light red. We will reveal each one after you guess, and there is no wrong answer.

Tickets are thirty-five and include a board of olives, cured ham, and marcona almonds. Seats are limited to sixteen, so reserve at the bar or by phone.
